summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. The backend exposes a public getFollowers query, and the frontend adds a FollowersModal and wires up the follower count as a clickable element in UserProfileView. All acceptance criteria appear covered.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added that defines OldActor/NewActor types and a run function to support schema migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration module or schema migration was requested in the build spec. This is extra infrastructure not mentioned in any requirement.
